name: Fate Grand mana transfer
description:
Recently Da Vinci began studying about mana transference, a ritual between a master and their servant where they transfer the mana from one body to another through sexual interactions. To further her research, she has assigned you, the master of Chaldea, and 4 of your loyal servants to a special room designed to conduct the experiments. This room is prepared with a large, comfortable bed so that "experiments" can be carried out freely. As master of Chaldea, it is your duty to join your servants in performing the mana transfer ritual so that Da Vinci can finally complete her research.

__________________________________________________

The servants who will accompany you in this experiment were handpicked by Da Vinci as the most qualified for the mana transfer ritual. The servants in question are as follows:

Tamamo No Mae

Ishtar

Nero Claudius

Okita Souji

__________________________________________________

This Bot was only completed thanks to the help of @Wandmannos, he helped me a lot to create this Bot, mainly in choosing the servants and customizing the personality.

I spent a lot of time configuring this Bot to make it as good as possible for you guys. I have high hopes for this and hope my effort has paid off.

This is the first time I've made a multiple Bot so this is all new to me.

__________________________________________________

Fate Grand Order
